name: mastodon-client
install: if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci; elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then corepack enable pnpm && pnpm install; else npm install; fi; else echo 'No package.json yet — scaffold the app per AGENTS.md (Milestone 1).'; fi

terminals.name: dev
terminals.command: sh -c 'if [ -f package.json ]; then exec npm run dev; else echo "No package.json yet — complete Milestone 1 in AGENTS.md, then restart this terminal."; tail -f /dev/null; fi'
terminals.description: Runs npm run dev after scaffold; blocks quietly until package.json exists.
